meta.title: Rail Safety Management System — for acceptance
meta.subtitle: ROGS/ORR element set · route resolved
meta.author: HSE Rail
meta.classification: Internal — for submission / competent-person review required
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label (accountable duty-holder, safety-critical roles, COSS). Identifiers and any Sentinel numbers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document. This SMS is submitted FOR acceptance; ORR acceptance is the Safety Authority's act and is not asserted here.

sections.text: This Safety Management System is built to the ROGS 2006 (SI 2006/599) element set for the named dutyholder. The dutyholder route is resolved first and held throughout: a mainline transport operator requires a safety certificate, an infrastructure manager a safety authorisation, and a non-mainline operation a ROGS Part 3 safety verification. It is submitted FOR acceptance — it does not assert acceptance by ORR.

metrics.label: Open [GAP]s
metrics.caption: each closed by a SMART action

sections.text: [GAP — the dutyholder's safety policy + measurable objectives]

sections.caption: Accountabilities — role / accountability / status (named individuals de-identified to role labels)

rows.title: [GAP — the operation's significant risk]
rows.description: [GAP — the controlled risk and its arrangement]

sections.text: Hierarchy of controls (every mitigation ranked, SFAIRP)

rows.control: [GAP — eliminate the hazard where reasonably practicable]

items: Significance test (safety relevance / novelty / complexity / monitoring / reversibility / additionality) — Reg (EU) 402/2013 (KB-REG-CSM-RA)
Risk-acceptance principle applied: codes of practice / reference systems / explicit risk estimation [GAP]
Independent AsBo (Assessment Body) for significant changes [GAP]

sections.text: [GAP — competence management + fitness-for-duty for safety-critical work; Sentinel where applicable; individual medical detail held in a separate confidential record]
[GAP — asset/infrastructure condition + Entity in Charge of Maintenance arrangements]
[GAP — the assurance/audit regime + the stated review cadence]
[GAP — how the SMS learns (incident learning, audit findings) and improves]

rows.action: [GAP — SMART action closing each open element]

sections.text: This SMS is submitted FOR acceptance. ORR is the Safety Authority; acceptance is its act and is not asserted in this document.

items: Railways and Other Guided Transport Systems (Safety) Regulations 2006 (SI 2006/599) — KB-REG-ROGS
Common Safety Method for Risk Evaluation and Assessment, Reg (EU) 402/2013 (retained EU law in GB) — KB-REG-CSM-RA
India: Railways Act 1989 / Commissioner of Railway Safety — KB-REG-IN-RAIL (state detection mandatory; no national form invented)
